rationale: Educ. Code §37.148 governs school employees' right to report crimes. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: An employee of a school district or open-enrollment charter school may report a crime witnessed at the school to any peace officer with authority to investigate the crime.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no conflict exists.
